name: Failing Regions Resolved Before Sign-off
description: Certification cannot be signed off while any region or test is failing; every conformance failure — whether in the counterparty or in the IPL model — must be resolved and re-run first.
rationale: Certification & Onboarding. Sign-off attests conformance to the model. A failing region is either a real counterparty defect or a model that does not match the ROE; either way it must be fixed and re-tested green, not signed over.

examples.passes: All decomposed regions pass on re-run → CertificationSignoff
examples.fails: CertificationSignoff while a cancel/replace region is still failing

source: Imandra Connectivity / IPL — Imandra Protocol Language for formalizing FIX Rules of Engagement (https://www.imandra.ai/connectivity, https://ipl.dev).
